positive: A vintage travel poster illustration of a futuristic desert cityscape at sunset. Inspired by 1950s retro-futurism and mid-century modern art. Limited color palette of mustard yellow, burnt orange, and turquoise. Screen print texture, distressed paper effect, highly stylized, Alphonse Mucha influence.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, digital noise, realism, modern typography
